allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for t in data['data']['activeTargets']: print\(f\\"{t['labels']['job']:15} {t['health']:5} last_scrape={t.get\('lastScrape',''\)} err={t.get\('lastError',''\)}\\"\)")
